frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bhai honestly shaadi scene ab risky lagta hai. Aajkal prenup bhi basic protection jaisa hai, warna divorce hua toh banda hi ATM ban jata hai and laws bhi mostly one-sided hi lagte hain. Har case genuine nahi hota, but men also need some safety yaar.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames marriage and divorce as a threat from women and implies women commonly exploit men financially. It encodes the 'prenup as protection from women' and 'one-sided laws/men as victims' manifestations in a concern-for-men's-rights style.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Ankit. Age 29. A software developer in Pune. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with your two closest male colleagues after your female team lead snapped at someone in today's standup meeting. You are commenting on she reacted that way due to periods.
